title: pixel valley
description: Retro pixel art landscape — 320×200 render with Bayer ordered dithering, scaled up with nearest-neighbor interpolation.
notes: Rendered at actual 320×200 resolution, then scaled 4× with nearest-neighbor — no smoothing, pure crunchy pixels. The 16-color palette is quantized using ordered Bayer dithering (4×4 threshold matrix), which creates those characteristic diagonal patterns. Triangle-shaped tree canopies are placed procedurally on the foreground terrain layers. The constraint of so few colors forces interesting visual decisions.
